user.title: IDM Navigator Heatpump
user.description: Enter the connection details of your IDM heat pump. Make sure Modbus TCP is activated in the IDM settings (Installer level).

data_description.name: A friendly name for your heat pump in Home Assistant.
data_description.host: The IP address of your IDM Navigator 2.0.
data_description.port: The Modbus TCP port (default is usually 502).

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure IDM Navigator Heatpump
reconfigure.description: Update the connection details of your heat pump.

options.title: Options
options.description: Configure scan intervals and heating circuits. Adjusting these will re-initialize the integration.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to read data from the heat pump. Lower values mean faster updates but more network traffic.
data_description.hide_unused_registers: Automatically hide sensors that return unused values (e.g. -1.0).
data_description.heating_circuits: Select which heating circuits (A-G) are configured on your heat pump.
data_description.zone_count: Select the number of Zone Modules you have installed (0 if none).

zones.title: Zone Configuration
zones.description: Configure the number of rooms per zone.

data_description.zone_0_rooms: Number of rooms active in Zone 1 (max 8).
data_description.zone_1_rooms: Number of rooms active in Zone 2 (max 8).
data_description.zone_2_rooms: Number of rooms active in Zone 3 (max 8).

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the heat pump. Check IP and port.

abort.already_configured: This heat pump is already configured.
